NGIS PHASE 3 — WEEKLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 24 – March 3, 2026
Report Date: March 3, 2026
Project Manager: Alice Tran
Project ID: NGIS-P3-2024-001
Overall Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The NGIS Phase 3 data centre consolidation project continues to progress
according to plan. The team has completed the Active Directory migration
for the test environment and finalized network topology designs for Sites
B and C. No risks are identified at this time.

---

ACCOMPLISHMENTS THIS WEEK

- Active Directory test migration completed successfully: 120 test
  accounts migrated with zero errors.
- Network topology diagrams finalized and signed off by infrastructure
  team.
- Legacy application inventory completed: 14 applications catalogued.
- Site A staging area prepared and equipment rack installation initiated.

---

PLANNED ACTIVITIES NEXT WEEK (Mar 4–10)

- Begin production AD migration preparation.
- Conduct UAT test script walkthroughs with application owners.
- Coordinate with TechSupplier for equipment delivery confirmation.
- Complete end-user communication plan.

---

SCHEDULE STATUS: ON TRACK

Milestone                          | Planned    | Forecast   | Status
Site A Network Staging             | Mar 6      | Mar 6      | On Track
AD Migration — Test Complete       | Mar 3      | Mar 3      | COMPLETE
Migration Window — Site A          | Mar 18     | Mar 18     | On Track
Project Closure                    | Jun 30     | Jun 30     | On Track

---

BUDGET STATUS: WITHIN APPROVED ENVELOPE

Approved Budget:        $2,400,000
Expenditures to Date:   $1,104,000 (46%)
Forecast Total Cost:    $2,395,000
Variance:               $5,000 (favourable)

Note: Equipment costs are tracking slightly below estimate due to volume
discount negotiated in Q3. Finance team has advised the variance is
within acceptable tolerance.

---

RISK AND ISSUES LOG

No new risks or issues to report this week. All previously identified
risks remain at low residual level following mitigations applied in
Sprint 5.

---

STAKEHOLDER UPDATES

- Director Okafor briefed on milestone progress — satisfied with current
  trajectory.
- TBS audit team scheduled for March site visit (details TBD).
- End-user communication campaign to launch March 9.

---

Report prepared by: Marie Lefebvre, Change Management Lead
Reviewed by: Alice Tran, Project Manager
Distribution: NGIS Steering Committee; Director Okafor; Finance Review Board
